themes.name: Berry
themes.description: Deep purple title with magenta/teal/blue month rotation (current default).

themes.name: Grayscale
themes.description: Pure monochrome — title near-black, months cycle through dark, medium, and light gray.

themes.name: Dark Mode
themes.description: Dark backgrounds, light text. Blue, green, and purple month accents.

themes.name: Sunset
themes.description: Warm oranges, corals, and dusky pinks.

themes.name: Pastels
themes.description: Soft muted pastels — lavender, blush, sage, sky.

themes.name: Retro Console
themes.description: Black background, neon green text, monospace font. Matrix terminal vibes.
